entities.name: Oymelor, Demefin, Lamair, Masair, Symofor, Rodobayl, Tentetos, Lotobor, Memoyr, Tamafin, Leutaber, Tatomofon, Faubair, Selutabel, Rimasor, Syrama

attributes.function: to make manifest whatever is said (banquet/entertainment)

entities.raw_quote: Oymelor, Demefin, Lamair, Masair, Symofor, Rodobayl, Tentetos, Lotobor, Memoyr, Tamafin, Leutaber, Tatomofon, Faubair, Selutabel, Rimasor, Syrama, most cheerful, glad and joyous spirits

entities.name: Usyr, Salaul, Silitor, Demor, Zanno, Syrtroy, Risbel, Cutroy, Lytay, Onor, Moloy, Pumotor, Tami, Oor, Ym

attributes.function: to bear arms and deceive human senses; to make fortifications and castles appear

entities.raw_quote: O Usyr, Salaul, Silitor, Demor, Zanno, Syrtroy, Risbel, Cutroy, Lytay, Onor, Moloy, Pumotor, Tami, Oor and Ym, squire spirits, whose function it is to bear arms and deceive human senses

entities.name: Conjuring an illusory banquet

attributes.timing: under a waxing moon, on a Thursday or Sunday, at noon
attributes.location: outside town, in a remote place
attributes.method: trace circles with sword, inscribe 16 names, face east/south/east/north while conjuring

entities.raw_quote: First one must invoke fifteen spirits... At the outset one must go outside town, under a waxing moon, on a Thursday or Sunday, at noon

entities.name: Conjuring an illusory castle

attributes.timing: tenth day of the moon, under a clear sky
attributes.method: sprinkle milk and honey in the air; face west, then south, east, and north

entities.raw_quote: First, go out on the tenth [day of] the moon, under a clear sky, outside of town to some remote and secret place, taking milk and honey with you

entities.name: Travel ointment

attributes.components: seven herbs, the fat of a goat and the blood of a bat

entities.raw_quote: to travel quickly wherever one wishes, one should make an ointment from seven herbs, the fat of a goat and the blood of a bat

entities.name: Unguentum pharelis

attributes.components: seven herbs mixed with the blood of a bird and the fat of an animal

entities.raw_quote: a salve called the unguentum pharelis, made of seven herbs mixed with the blood of a bird and the fat of an animal

entities.name: Shining sword

attributes.use: tracing circles and inscribing names in the ground

entities.raw_quote: carrying a shining sword and a hoopoe, and with the sword one must trace circles in a remote place.

entities.name: Hoopoe

attributes.virtue: great virtue for necromancers and invokers of demons; used for safekeeping/protection

entities.raw_quote: the hoopoe is possessed of great virtue for necromancers and invokers of demons... on which account we use it much for our safekeeping.

summary: This chunk details two major illusionist experiments from the Munich handbook: the conjuration of a lavish banquet (no. 6) and an illusory castle (no. 7). It describes specific rituals involving timing, tools like swords and hoopoes, and ingredients such as milk, honey, and magical ointments.
key_passages: First one must invoke fifteen spirits... carrying a shining sword and a hoopoe
to travel quickly wherever one wishes, one should make an ointment from seven herbs, the fat of a goat and the blood of a bat
The following experiment (no. 7) is designed to obtain an illusory castle, with defenders.
taking milk and honey with you, some of a which you must sprinkle in the air.
the hoopoe is possessed of great virtue for necromancers and invokers of demons
